name: DAAD Research Grant
description: Funded research stays in Germany for international students in engineering and natural sciences. Covers living costs, travel, and health insurance.

name: Fulbright Foreign Student Program
description: One of the most prestigious scholarships globally. Covers full tuition, living allowance, and health insurance for graduate study in the United States.

name: Chevening Scholarships
description: UK government's global scholarship programme for future leaders. Covers tuition, living expenses, flights, and visa costs for a one-year master's degree.

name: KAUST Fellowship
organization: King Abdullah University of Science & Technology
description: Generous fellowship for graduate students in energy, engineering, and applied sciences. Includes tuition, housing, health insurance, and a research budget.

name: Mastercard Foundation Scholars Program
description: Supports academically talented yet economically disadvantaged young Africans. Partners with top universities worldwide to provide full scholarships.

name: Erasmus Mundus Joint Master
description: Joint master's programme taught across multiple European universities in sustainable energy. Covers tuition, travel, installation costs, and monthly allowance.

name: Commonwealth Scholarship
description: For students from Commonwealth countries to study in the UK. Covers fees, living expenses, and airfare for those who could not otherwise afford to study abroad.

name: Korea Government Scholarship (GKS)
description: Full scholarship for international students pursuing graduate degrees at top Korean universities. Includes Korean language training, round-trip airfare, and health insurance.

name: African Development Bank Scholarship
description: Targets African nationals pursuing postgraduate studies in development-related fields including engineering, energy, and infrastructure. Priority given to underrepresented countries.

name: OPEC Fund International Development Scholarship
description: Supports students from developing countries pursuing graduate education in energy, sustainable development, and related engineering fields.
